lines.english: Who made the only funny joke that evening and why?
lines.chinese: 谁在那个晚上讲了唯一一个好笑的笑话，为什么？
lines.raw: Who made the only funny joke that evening and why? | 谁在那个晚上讲了唯一一个好笑的笑话，为什么？

lines.english: People will do anything to see a free show--even if it is a bad one.
lines.chinese: 人们会不惜一切去看免费演出——即使演出很糟糕。
lines.raw: People will do anything to see a free show--even if it is a bad one. | 人们会不惜一切去看免费演出——即使演出很糟糕。

lines.english: When the news got round that a comedy show would be presented
lines.chinese: 当喜剧表演将在当地电影院上演的消息传开时
lines.raw: When the news got round that a comedy show would be presented | 当喜剧表演将在当地电影院上演的消息传开时

lines.english: at our local cinema by the P. and U. Bird Seed Company, we all rushed to see it.
lines.chinese: 由P. and U. 鸟食公司在当地电影院呈现时，我们都抢着去看。
lines.raw: at our local cinema by the P. and U. Bird Seed Company, we all rushed to see it. | 由P. and U. 鸟食公司在当地电影院呈现时，我们都抢着去看。

lines.english: We had to queue for hours to get in and there must have been several hundred people present just before the show began.
lines.chinese: 我们排了几个小时的队才进去，演出开始前肯定有几百人到场。
lines.raw: We had to queue for hours to get in and there must have been several hundred people present just before the show began. | 我们排了几个小时的队才进去，演出开始前肯定有几百人到场。

lines.english: Unfortunately, the show was one of the dullest we have ever seen.
lines.chinese: 不幸的是，这场演出是我们看过的最乏味的一场。
lines.raw: Unfortunately, the show was one of the dullest we have ever seen. | 不幸的是，这场演出是我们看过的最乏味的一场。

lines.english: Those who failed to get in need not have felt disappointed,
lines.chinese: 那些没能进去的人大可不必感到失望，
lines.raw: Those who failed to get in need not have felt disappointed, | 那些没能进去的人大可不必感到失望，

lines.english: as many of the artistes who should have appeared did not come.
lines.chinese: 因为许多本应出席的艺人都没有来。
lines.raw: as many of the artistes who should have appeared did not come. | 因为许多本应出席的艺人都没有来。

lines.english: The only funny things we heard that evening came from the advertiser at the beginning of the programme.
lines.chinese: 那个晚上我们听到的唯一有趣的事情，来自节目开始时的广告商。
lines.raw: The only funny things we heard that evening came from the advertiser at the beginning of the programme. | 那个晚上我们听到的唯一有趣的事情，来自节目开始时的广告商。

lines.english: He was obviously very nervous and for some minutes stood awkwardly before the microphone.
lines.chinese: 他显然非常紧张，几分钟内尴尬地站在麦克风前。
lines.raw: He was obviously very nervous and for some minutes stood awkwardly before the microphone. | 他显然非常紧张，几分钟内尴尬地站在麦克风前。

lines.english: As soon as he opened his mouth, everyone burst out laughing.
lines.chinese: 他一开口，每个人都哈哈大笑起来。
lines.raw: As soon as he opened his mouth, everyone burst out laughing. | 他一开口，每个人都哈哈大笑起来。

lines.english: We all know what the poor man should have said,
lines.chinese: 我们都知道这位可怜人本该说什么，
lines.raw: We all know what the poor man should have said, | 我们都知道这位可怜人本该说什么，

lines.english: but what he actually said was: 'This is the Poo and Ee Seed Bird Company. Good ladies, evening and gentlemen!'
lines.chinese: 但他实际说的是：“这是噗和咿鸟食公司。女士们，晚上好，先生们！”
lines.raw: but what he actually said was: 'This is the Poo and Ee Seed Bird Company. Good ladies, evening and gentlemen!' | 但他实际说的是：“这是噗和咿鸟食公司。女士们，晚上好，先生们！”
